description_long: This is a two-story modern bungalow with a hip roof featuring light beige tiles and two visible chimneys. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray or off-white color, accented by stone or textured columns and trim. Large, rectangular windows dominate the front facade, with a prominent set of glass doors and a covered porch supported by columns on one side. The structure sits on a raised brick or stone foundation, and the porch wraps partially around the side, providing sheltered outdoor space. The overall design is clean and geometric, with a focus on symmetry and open, airy window arrangements.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a hip roof, large windows, and a covered porch supported by columns. The exterior features light-colored walls and a raised foundation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass windows, and the covered porch extending to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid wall with minimal windows and the edge of the porch roof.
description_view_2: Rear or opposite side view displaying additional windows, the porch entrance, and more of the building's length.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the porch area, roofline, and a few upper-story windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
